name: FANTASYQUEST: ERRANDSAGA
short_description: ( Request Announcement )Bin, has been brainwashed by the demon 'Basilisk'.Visit the mercenary agency 'Ninas Errand' on the continent of Mirgard.
detailed_description:
Character collecting RPG, FANTASY QUEST: ERRAND SAGA!

( Request Announcement )
Bin, has been brainwashed by the demon 'Basilisk'.
Visit the mercenary agency 'Ninas Errand' on the continent of Mirgard.

( About the Game )
▶the story Behind the Commission
- Organize a group of mercenaries and save the city from a group of demons.
- Find clues about the "Soul Eyes" who brainwashed Bin.

▶performing the 'ninas errand' Commission
- You'll take on any assignment, and you'll need to complete it successfully.
- We encourage you to take on a variety of quests and events.

▶assemble Your Own Mercenary Squad
- You can collect, train, and develop around 50 unique mercenaries.
- Train them, but don't forget to socialize with them.

▶brain-teasing Strategy Elements
- Build your own deck, taking into account each class and their attributes.
- 3x3 tile layout for an always-on passive.

▶Spectacular combat that's a feast for the eyes and ears
- Experience cool skill effects and colorful BGM/SFX.
- Bring your battles to life.
